CVE-2019-15522.title: An issue was discovered in LINBIT csync2 through 2.0. csync_daemo ...
CVE-2019-15522.summary: An issue was discovered in LINBIT csync2 through 2.0. csync_daemon_session in daemon.c neglects to force a failure of a hello command when the configuration requires use of SSL.

CVE-2019-15523.title: An issue was discovered in LINBIT csync2 through 2.0. It does not ...
CVE-2019-15523.summary: An issue was discovered in LINBIT csync2 through 2.0. It does not correctly check for the return value GNUTLS_E_WARNING_ALERT_RECEIVED of the gnutls_handshake() function. It neglects to call this function again, as required by the design of the API.
